prompt: A deeply emotional data visualization showing how 1% of the world's population owns 50% of global wealth. No bar charts, no pie charts, no axes, no labels, no legends. A vast dark ocean with a tiny blazing golden island. The island represents the 1%, the endless dark water represents the 99%. Photorealistic, magazine cover quality, single frame, cinematic lighting.
insight: The wealthiest 1% of humans own more than half of all global wealth, leaving 99% to share the remainder.
